title: HTTP Status Code Reference
description: Search and filter every HTTP status code with name, description, and category — the dev cheat sheet you'll bookmark
viralHook: Finally bookmarked an HTTP status code reference that doesn't suck

props.title: HTTP Status Codes
rows: Server received request headers; client should proceed
Server is switching protocols as requested by the client
Request succeeded; response body contains the result
Request succeeded and a new resource was created
Request accepted for processing but not yet completed
Request succeeded but response contains no body
Server delivering partial resource due to range header
Resource permanently moved to a new URL
Resource temporarily at a different URL
Cached version is still valid; no new content sent
Redirect with same HTTP method preserved
Permanent redirect with same HTTP method preserved
Server cannot process request due to client error
Authentication required and has failed or not been provided
Server understood request but refuses to authorize it
Requested resource could not be found on the server
HTTP method not supported for the requested resource
Server timed out waiting for the request
Request conflicts with current state of the resource
Resource has been permanently deleted and will not return
Request well-formed but has semantic errors (validation failed)
User has sent too many requests in a given time (rate limiting)
Generic server-side error; something went wrong
Server does not support the requested functionality
Server acting as gateway received an invalid response upstream
Server is temporarily unavailable (overloaded or down)
Gateway did not receive a timely response from upstream
